items.title: After Europe, WhatsApp will let rival AI companies offer chatbots in Brazil
items.summary: Meta is now allowing rival AI companies to provide their chatbots on WhatsApp to Brazilian users for a fee, a day after the company confirmed a similar decision for users in Europe.

items.title: Build a serverless conversational AI agent using Claude with LangGraph and managed MLflow on Amazon SageMaker AI
items.summary: This post explores how to build an intelligent conversational agent using Amazon Bedrock, LangGraph, and managed MLflow on Amazon SageMaker AI.

items.title: Ring’s Jamie Siminoff has been trying to calm privacy fears since the Super Bowl, but his answers may not help
items.summary: The facial recognition question is where things get more tangled.

items.title: Will the Pentagon’s Anthropic controversy scare startups away from defense work?
items.summary: On the latest episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, we discussed what the controversy means for other startups seeking to work with the federal government.

items.title: Owner of ICE detention facility sees big opportunity in AI man camps
items.summary: AI data center developers are increasingly relying on a style of camp popularized as housing for men working in remote oil fields.

items.title: Anthropic’s Claude found 22 vulnerabilities in Firefox over two weeks
items.summary: In a recent security partnership with Mozilla, Anthropic found 22 separate vulnerabilities in Firefox — 14 of them classified as "high-severity."

items.title: Introducing ChatGPT for Excel and new financial data integrations
items.summary: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT for Excel and new financial app integrations, powered by GPT-5.4 to accelerate modeling, research, and analysis in regulated environments.

items.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
items.summary: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.

items.title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
items.summary: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.

items.title: A roadmap for AI, if anyone will listen
items.summary: The Pro-Human Declaration was finalized before last week's Pentagon-Anthropic standoff, but the collision of the two events wasn’t lost on anyone involved.
